parsed_output.justification: James is the most suspicious player due to his contradictory claims. He initially claimed to be the Seer, but later claimed he was a Werewolf who was swapped by the Robber (Elliot), effectively trying to shift the Werewolf role onto Elliot. This inconsistency suggests he is either the Werewolf attempting to divert suspicion or the Tanner, but his deceptive behavior makes him the most likely candidate for the Werewolf.
